# Testing Notes

Use this file for repo-specific validation guidance that helps agents prove research and implementation changes.

## Good Content

- default test, lint, typecheck, or packaging commands
- the narrowest checks for common surfaces
- environment-specific setup or platform quirks
- known expensive or flaky validations and when they are worth running

## Capture Rule

Prefer concrete commands and decision rules over long narratives so future testing stays fast and repeatable.
